zh.lifeSummary: Gilbert De Renty於大約1151年與Louise de Tingry在法國諾爾-帕-德-卡拉斯帕-德-卡拉斯雷迪結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和4個女兒的父母。他去世於1177年。

nameMeanings.name: De
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Renty
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: German: variant of   Renz   and, in North America, its altered form.

variants.name: Renslow
meanings: Perhaps an altered form of German Renzle, from a pet form of Rentz .

variants.name: Rentzel
meanings: habitational name from Renzel in Hanover.
from a pet form of the personal name   Rentz  .

variants.name: Renze
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Rafael, Josefina, Mercedes.
North German: archaic form of Rentz 1 (from Lorenz).

variants.name: Renz
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Otto, Erwin, Horst, Fritz, Hans, Kurt.
German: from the personal name Renz, a short form of Reinhard (see Reinhardt ) or Lorenz (see Lawrence ).
German: habitational name from any of several places called Renz or Rentz in Pomerania and the former East Prussia.

nameMeanings.name: Gilbert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Old French name of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from gisil ‘pledge’ + berht ‘bright, famous’. It was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain. This was the name of the founder of the only native British religious order (abolished at the Dissolution of the Monasteries), St Gilbert of Sempringham ( ?1083–1189 ), in whose honour it is still sometimes bestowed, especially among Roman Catholics. It gained a wider currency in the 19th century.

en.lifeSummary: Gilbert De Renty married Louise de Tingry about 1151, in Renty, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, France. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 4 daughters. He died in 1177.

fr.lifeSummary: Gilbert De Renty a épousé Louise de Tingry environ 1151, à Renty, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, France. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 4 filles. Il est décédé en 1177.

de.lifeSummary: Gilbert De Renty hat um 1151 in Renty, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, Frankreich Louise de Tingry geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Er starb 1177.

it.lifeSummary: Gilbert De Renty lui sposato Louise de Tingry circa 1151, nel Renty, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, Francia. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 4 figlie. Morì nel 1177.

ja.lifeSummary: Gilbert De Rentyは約1151年にフランスノード-プアス-デ-カレイスプアス-デ-カレイスレントイでLouise de Tingryと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼は1177年に死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Gilbert De Renty(은)는 대략 1151년 프랑스 노르드-파스-데-캘레이 파스-데-캘레이 렌티에서 Louise de Tingry(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1177년 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Gilbert De Renty casou-se com Louise de Tingry aproximadamente 1151, em Renty, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, França. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 4 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1177.

ru.lifeSummary: Gilbert De Renty женился на женщине по имени Louise de Tingry около 1151 г. в местности ренти, пас-де-калеи, норд-пас-де-калеи, Франция. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 4 дочери. Он умер в 1177 г.

es.lifeSummary: Gilbert De Renty se casó con Louise de Tingry aproximadamente 1151, en Renty, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, Francia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió en 1177.
